do: Pick the edge with the side prop; compose DrawerHeader / DrawerFooter.
Give the drawer an aria-label describing its purpose (e.g. "Filters").
dont: Don't use Drawer for centered, focused confirmations — use dialog or alert-dialog.

boundaries: Built on the Base UI dialog — NOT the vaul package shadcn uses; a deliberate divergence.

whenToUseInstead.when: a centered focused task or confirmation
persistent app navigation rather than a transient panel
